description: Freezes rent for eligible senior citizens (62+) in rent-regulated apartments. Protects against rent increases.

eligibility.rent_burden_note: Must be paying more than 1/3 of income toward rent.
eligibility.notes: Must live in a rent-stabilized, rent-controlled, or certain other regulated housing. Combined household income must be $50,000 or less.

apply_in_person: Apply by mail or visit the NYC Department of Finance office.
how_to_apply: Apply online, by mail, or in person at the NYC Department of Finance. You'll need proof of age, income, lease, and rent-regulated status.
citation: NYC Administrative Code § 26-509; NY Real Property Tax Law § 467-b
update_frequency: subject to city council action (income limit may change)
